text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People are packed tightly into the venue, all
hoping to witness the birth of a new legend.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: I want Brian to win! It's more exciting that way!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I'm Team Rudolf! There's absolutely no way the
Emperor will be defeated!
Hehe, coming in for landing! Mind if I cut ahead?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well aren't you quite the little thing! Haha,
yeah, go ahead to the front!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're such a cutie. Hey, who are you
cheering for?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm Team Mayano Top Gun, of course!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, no matter how hard I think about it, I
can't see myself beating Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But every time I try to picture it, I hear blood
pounding in my ears.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: My heart's telling me to win against myself.
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I think this is what I've been waiting for all this
time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Today is the day I finally surpass Symboli Rudolf!
